Your personal AI assistant, living on your own Mac.
entries.translated: Asisten AI pribadi Anda, berjalan di Mac Anda sendiri.

entries.source: It answers questions, works with your files and apps, and can chat with you on WhatsApp or Telegram. Setup takes about two minutes.
entries.translated: Asisten ini menjawab pertanyaan, bekerja dengan file dan aplikasi Anda, dan dapat mengobrol dengan Anda di WhatsApp atau Telegram. Penyiapan memerlukan sekitar dua menit.

entries.source: Give your assistant tasks and let it help across your Mac.
entries.translated: Berikan tugas kepada asisten Anda dan biarkan asisten membantu di seluruh Mac Anda.
Chat di mana pun Anda suka

entries.source: This app, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack — your choice.
entries.translated: Aplikasi ini, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack — pilihan Anda.

entries.source: Everything runs where you decide, with permissions you grant.
entries.translated: Semuanya berjalan di tempat yang Anda tentukan, dengan izin yang Anda berikan.

entries.source: OpenClaw can take actions using the permissions and services you enable. Review prompts and only connect tools you trust.
entries.translated: OpenClaw dapat melakukan tindakan menggunakan izin dan layanan yang Anda aktifkan. Tinjau permintaan dan hanya hubungkan alat yang Anda percayai.
Di mana asisten Anda sebaiknya berjalan?

entries.source: Most people pick this Mac — OpenClaw installs everything and keeps it running in the background. You can change this anytime in Settings.
entries.translated: Kebanyakan orang memilih Mac ini — OpenClaw memasang semuanya dan membuatnya tetap berjalan di latar belakang. Anda dapat mengubahnya kapan saja di Pengaturan.

entries.source: Skip Gateway setup for now; pick Local or Remote later in Settings → General.
entries.translated: Lewati penyiapan Gateway untuk saat ini; pilih Lokal atau Jarak Jauh nanti di Pengaturan → Umum.

entries.source: OK — OpenClaw won’t start anything yet. Pick Local or Remote later in Settings → General.
entries.translated: OK — OpenClaw belum akan memulai apa pun. Pilih Lokal atau Jarak Jauh nanti di Pengaturan → Umum.

entries.source: 1 gateway found on your network — click to choose it.
entries.translated: 1 gateway ditemukan di jaringan Anda — klik untuk memilihnya.

entries.source: \(count) gateways found on your network — click to choose one.
entries.translated: \(count) gateway ditemukan di jaringan Anda — klik untuk memilih salah satu.

entries.source: No gateways found on your network yet.
entries.translated: Belum ada gateway yang ditemukan di jaringan Anda.

entries.source: Tip: keep Tailscale enabled so your gateway stays reachable.
entries.translated: Tips: tetap aktifkan Tailscale agar gateway Anda tetap dapat dijangkau.

entries.source: Tip: use Tailscale Serve so the gateway has a valid HTTPS cert.
entries.translated: Tips: gunakan Tailscale Serve agar gateway memiliki sertifikat HTTPS yang valid.

entries.source: Checks the real remote websocket and auth handshake.
entries.translated: Memeriksa websocket jarak jauh yang sebenarnya dan handshake autentikasi.

entries.source: Used when the remote gateway requires token auth.
entries.translated: Digunakan saat gateway jarak jauh memerlukan autentikasi token.

entries.source: The current gateway.remote.token value is not plain text. OpenClaw for macOS cannot use it directly; enter a plaintext token here to replace it.
entries.translated: Nilai gateway.remote.token saat ini bukan teks biasa. OpenClaw for macOS tidak dapat menggunakannya secara langsung; masukkan token teks biasa di sini untuk menggantinya.

entries.source: These macOS permissions let OpenClaw automate apps and capture context on this Mac. Status updates automatically.
entries.translated: Izin macOS ini memungkinkan OpenClaw mengotomatiskan aplikasi dan menangkap konteks di Mac ini. Status diperbarui secara otomatis.

entries.source: OpenClaw is setting up its background service on this Mac. This usually takes under a minute — no Terminal, no administrator password.
entries.translated: OpenClaw sedang menyiapkan layanan latar belakangnya di Mac ini. Ini biasanya memakan waktu kurang dari satu menit — tanpa Terminal, tanpa kata sandi administrator.

entries.source: Runs quietly and starts again after a restart.
entries.translated: Berjalan senyap dan mulai lagi setelah dimulai ulang.

entries.source: Once the service answers, you’ll connect your AI.
entries.translated: Setelah layanan merespons, Anda akan menghubungkan AI Anda.

entries.source: OpenClaw runs the agent from a dedicated workspace so it can load `AGENTS.md` and write files there without mixing into your other projects.
entries.translated: OpenClaw menjalankan agen dari ruang kerja khusus agar dapat memuat `AGENTS.md` dan menulis file di sana tanpa bercampur dengan proyek Anda yang lain.

entries.source: Create the workspace on the remote host (SSH in first). The macOS app can’t write files on your gateway over SSH yet.
entries.translated: Buat ruang kerja di host jarak jauh (masuk melalui SSH terlebih dahulu). App macOS belum dapat menulis file di gateway Anda melalui SSH.

entries.source: Tip: edit AGENTS.md in this folder to shape the assistant’s behavior. For backup, make the workspace a private git repo so your agent’s “memory” is versioned.
entries.translated: Tips: edit AGENTS.md di folder ini untuk membentuk perilaku asisten. Untuk pencadangan, jadikan workspace sebagai repo git pribadi agar “memori” agen Anda memiliki versi.

entries.source: Your agent introduces itself, picks a name with you, and helps you connect WhatsApp, Telegram, or another channel — just chat.
entries.translated: Agen Anda memperkenalkan diri, memilih nama bersama Anda, dan membantu Anda menghubungkan WhatsApp, Telegram, atau kanal lain — cukup mengobrol.

entries.source: Finish opens the chat — say hi to your new agent.
entries.translated: Selesai akan membuka obrolan — sapa agen baru Anda.

entries.source: Pick Local or Remote in Settings → General whenever you’re ready.
entries.translated: Pilih Local atau Remote di Settings → General kapan pun Anda siap.

entries.source:
On your gateway host: install/update the `openclaw` package and make sure credentials exist
(typically `~/.openclaw/credentials/oauth.json`). Then connect again if needed.
entries.translated:
Di host gateway Anda: instal/perbarui paket `openclaw` dan pastikan kredensial tersedia
(biasanya `~/.openclaw/credentials/oauth.json`). Lalu hubungkan lagi jika diperlukan.

entries.source: Click the OpenClaw menu bar icon for quick chat and status.
entries.translated: Klik ikon bilah menu OpenClaw untuk obrolan cepat dan status.

entries.source: Open Settings → Channels to link channels and monitor status.
entries.translated: Buka Settings → Channels untuk menautkan saluran dan memantau status.

entries.source: Enable Voice Wake in Settings for hands-free commands with a live transcript overlay.
entries.translated: Aktifkan Voice Wake di Settings untuk perintah bebas genggam dengan overlay transkrip langsung.

entries.source: Open the menu bar panel for quick chat; the agent can show previews
entries.translated: Buka panel bilah menu untuk chat cepat; agen dapat menampilkan pratinjau
Beri agen Anda lebih banyak kemampuan

entries.source: Enable optional skills (Peekaboo, oracle, camsnap, …) from Settings → Skills.
entries.translated: Aktifkan skills opsional (Peekaboo, oracle, camsnap, …) dari Settings → Skills.

entries.source: Couldn’t load skills from the Gateway.
entries.translated: Tidak dapat memuat skills dari Gateway.

entries.source: Make sure the Gateway is running and connected, then hit Refresh (or open Settings → Skills).
entries.translated: Pastikan Gateway berjalan dan terhubung, lalu tekan Segarkan (atau buka Settings → Skills).

entries.source: macOS access for notifications, capture, voice, and device context.
entries.translated: Akses macOS untuk notifikasi, tangkapan, suara, dan konteks perangkat.

entries.source: Use this if macOS prompts were skipped or permissions need a fresh walkthrough.
entries.translated: Gunakan ini jika perintah macOS terlewat atau izin memerlukan panduan ulang dari awal.

entries.source: OpenClaw only asks for macOS capabilities when a feature needs them.
entries.translated: OpenClaw hanya meminta kemampuan macOS saat suatu fitur membutuhkannya.

entries.source: Allow agents to use device location when a tool asks for it.
entries.translated: Izinkan agen menggunakan lokasi perangkat saat alat memintanya.

entries.source: Always may require System Settings to approve background location.
entries.translated: Selalu mungkin memerlukan System Settings untuk menyetujui lokasi latar belakang.

entries.source: Recheck macOS after approving access in System Settings.
entries.translated: Periksa ulang macOS setelah menyetujui akses di Pengaturan Sistem.

entries.source: Control other apps (e.g. Terminal) for automation actions
entries.translated: Kontrol aplikasi lain (mis. Terminal) untuk tindakan otomatisasi

entries.source: Show desktop alerts for agent activity
entries.translated: Tampilkan peringatan desktop untuk aktivitas agen

entries.source: Control UI elements when an action requires it
entries.translated: Kontrol elemen UI saat suatu tindakan memerlukannya

entries.source: Capture the screen for context or screenshots
entries.translated: Tangkap layar untuk konteks atau tangkapan layar

entries.source: Allow Voice Wake and audio capture
entries.translated: Izinkan Voice Wake dan pengambilan audio

entries.source: Transcribe Voice Wake trigger phrases on-device
entries.translated: Transkripsikan frasa pemicu Voice Wake di perangkat

entries.source: Capture photos and video from the camera
entries.translated: Ambil foto dan video dari kamera

entries.source: Share location when requested by the agent
entries.translated: Bagikan lokasi saat diminta oleh agen

entries.source: This gateway requires an auth token
That token did not match the gateway
entries.translated: Token tersebut tidak cocok dengan gateway

entries.source: This gateway host needs token setup
entries.translated: Host gateway ini memerlukan penyiapan token

entries.source: This setup code is no longer valid
entries.translated: Kode penyiapan ini sudah tidak valid

entries.source: This gateway is using unsupported auth
entries.translated: Gateway ini menggunakan autentikasi yang tidak didukung

entries.source: Paste the token configured on the gateway host.
entries.translated: Tempel token yang dikonfigurasi di host gateway.

entries.source: Check `gateway.auth.token` or `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN` on the gateway host and try again.
entries.translated: Periksa `gateway.auth.token` atau `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN` di host gateway lalu coba lagi.

entries.source: This gateway is set to token auth, but no `gateway.auth.token` is configured on the gateway host.
entries.translated: Gateway ini diatur ke autentikasi token, tetapi tidak ada `gateway.auth.token` yang dikonfigurasi di host gateway.

entries.source: Scan or paste a fresh setup code from an already-paired OpenClaw client, then try again.
entries.translated: Pindai atau tempel kode penyiapan baru dari klien OpenClaw yang sudah dipasangkan, lalu coba lagi.

entries.source: This onboarding flow does not support password auth yet.
entries.translated: Alur onboarding ini belum mendukung autentikasi kata sandi.

entries.source: Approve this device from an already-paired OpenClaw client.
entries.translated: Setujui perangkat ini dari klien OpenClaw yang sudah dipasangkan.

entries.source: This gateway requires an auth token from the gateway host.
entries.translated: Gateway ini memerlukan token autentikasi dari host gateway.

entries.source: Gateway token mismatch. Check gateway.auth.token or OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN on the gateway host.
entries.translated: Token gateway tidak cocok. Periksa gateway.auth.token atau OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN di host gateway.

entries.source: This gateway has token auth enabled, but no gateway.auth.token is configured on the host.
entries.translated: Gateway ini mengaktifkan autentikasi token, tetapi tidak ada gateway.auth.token yang dikonfigurasi di host.

entries.source: Setup code expired or already used. Scan a fresh setup code, then try again.
entries.translated: Kode penyiapan kedaluwarsa atau sudah digunakan. Pindai kode penyiapan baru, lalu coba lagi.

entries.source: This gateway uses password auth. Remote onboarding on macOS cannot collect gateway passwords yet.
entries.translated: Gateway ini menggunakan autentikasi kata sandi. Onboarding jarak jauh di macOS belum dapat mengumpulkan kata sandi gateway.

entries.source: Pairing required. In an already-paired OpenClaw client,
entries.translated: Diperlukan pemasangan. Di klien OpenClaw yang sudah dipasangkan,

entries.source: ssh tunnel did not open local port \(localPort)
entries.translated: tunnel ssh tidak membuka port lokal \(localPort)

entries.source: OpenClaw needs notification permission to show alerts for agent actions.
entries.translated: OpenClaw memerlukan izin notifikasi untuk menampilkan peringatan atas tindakan agen.

entries.source: OpenClaw captures the screen when the agent needs screenshots for context.
entries.translated: OpenClaw menangkap layar saat agen memerlukan tangkapan layar untuk konteks.

entries.source: OpenClaw can capture photos or short video clips when requested by the agent.
entries.translated: OpenClaw dapat mengambil foto atau klip video pendek saat diminta oleh agen.

entries.source: OpenClaw can share your location when requested by the agent.
entries.translated: OpenClaw dapat membagikan lokasi Anda saat diminta oleh agen.

entries.source: OpenClaw uses the local network to connect to your remote OpenClaw gateway over LAN, Tailnet, or SSH.
entries.translated: OpenClaw menggunakan jaringan lokal untuk terhubung ke gateway OpenClaw jarak jauh Anda melalui LAN, Tailnet, atau SSH.

entries.source: OpenClaw needs the mic for Voice Wake tests and agent audio capture.
entries.translated: OpenClaw memerlukan mikrofon untuk pengujian Voice Wake dan penangkapan audio agen.

entries.source: OpenClaw uses speech recognition to detect your Voice Wake trigger phrase.
entries.translated: OpenClaw menggunakan pengenalan ucapan untuk mendeteksi frasa pemicu Voice Wake Anda.

entries.source: OpenClaw needs Automation (AppleScript) permission to drive Terminal and other apps for agent actions.
entries.translated: OpenClaw memerlukan izin Automation (AppleScript) untuk mengendalikan Terminal dan aplikasi lain untuk tindakan agen.

entries.source: OpenClaw can access Reminders when requested by the agent for the apple-reminders skill.
entries.translated: OpenClaw dapat mengakses Reminders saat diminta oleh agen untuk skill apple-reminders.

entries.source: Peek at the stored conversation buckets the CLI reuses for context and rate limits.
entries.translated: Intip bucket percakapan tersimpan yang digunakan kembali oleh CLI untuk konteks dan batas laju.

entries.source: No sessions yet. They appear after the first inbound message or heartbeat.
entries.translated: Belum ada sesi. Sesi muncul setelah pesan masuk atau heartbeat pertama.

entries.source: Optional capabilities that become available when their requirements are met.
entries.translated: Kemampuan opsional yang tersedia saat persyaratannya terpenuhi.

entries.source: Enable ready skills, or install missing tools on the Gateway or this Mac.
entries.translated: Aktifkan skills yang siap, atau instal alat yang belum ada di Gateway atau Mac ini.

entries.source: Refresh after changing binaries, environment variables, or skill config.
entries.translated: Segarkan setelah mengubah binary, variabel lingkungan, atau konfigurasi skill.
Tidak ada skills yang cocok dengan filter ini.

entries.source: Switches to Local mode to install on this Mac.
entries.translated: Beralih ke mode Lokal untuk menginstal di Mac ini.
Disimpan ke openclaw.json di bawah skills.entries.\(self.editor.skillKey)

entries.source: Control how agent shell commands are approved on this Mac.
entries.translated: Kontrol cara perintah shell agen disetujui di Mac ini.

entries.source: Used when the companion UI cannot display an approval prompt.
entries.translated: Digunakan ketika UI pendamping tidak dapat menampilkan prompt persetujuan.

entries.source: Let bundled skill command-line tools run without prompting.
entries.translated: Izinkan alat baris perintah skill bawaan berjalan tanpa prompt.

entries.source: Bare names match PATH commands. Use a path glob for a specific binary.
entries.translated: Nama polos cocok dengan perintah PATH. Gunakan glob jalur untuk biner tertentu.

entries.source: Select an agent scope above to add trusted commands.
entries.translated: Pilih cakupan agen di atas untuk menambahkan perintah tepercaya.

entries.source: Commands that miss the allowlist follow the prompt and fallback policy above.
entries.translated: Perintah yang tidak masuk allowlist mengikuti kebijakan prompt dan fallback di atas.

entries.source: system.run requests are denied unless the policy changes.
entries.translated: Permintaan system.run ditolak kecuali kebijakan berubah.

entries.source: Known commands can run; new commands use the prompt policy.
entries.translated: Perintah yang dikenal dapat dijalankan; perintah baru menggunakan kebijakan prompt.

entries.source: Agents can run shell commands on this Mac without allowlist checks.
entries.translated: Agent dapat menjalankan perintah shell di Mac ini tanpa pemeriksaan allowlist.

entries.source: Block agent shell commands on this Mac.
entries.translated: Blokir perintah shell agent di Mac ini.

entries.source: Allow trusted command patterns and handle misses with prompts.
entries.translated: Izinkan pola perintah tepercaya dan tangani yang tidak cocok dengan prompt.

entries.source: Allow shell commands without checking the allowlist.
entries.translated: Izinkan perintah shell tanpa memeriksa allowlist.

entries.source: Ask only when a command is not trusted yet.
entries.translated: Tanyakan hanya saat perintah belum tepercaya.
HTTPS khusus Tailnet melalui Tailscale Serve.

entries.source: Public HTTPS via Tailscale Funnel (requires auth).
entries.translated: HTTPS publik melalui Tailscale Funnel (memerlukan autentikasi).

entries.source: Local mode required. Update settings on the gateway host.
entries.translated: Mode lokal diperlukan. Perbarui pengaturan di host gateway.

entries.source: Start Tailscale to get your tailnet hostname.
entries.translated: Mulai Tailscale untuk mendapatkan nama host tailnet Anda.

entries.source: Serve uses Tailscale identity headers; no password required.
entries.translated: Serve menggunakan header identitas Tailscale; tidak perlu kata sandi.

entries.source: Stored in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json. Prefer OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PASSWORD for production.
entries.translated: Disimpan di ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json. Sebaiknya gunakan OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PASSWORD untuk produksi.

entries.source: Voice Wake requires macOS 26 or newer
entries.translated: Voice Wake memerlukan macOS 26 atau yang lebih baru

entries.source: The Voice Wake and push-to-talk controls are hidden on older macOS versions.
entries.translated: Kontrol Voice Wake dan push-to-talk disembunyikan pada versi macOS yang lebih lama.

entries.source: Wake phrases, push-to-talk, microphone input, and Talk Mode feedback.
entries.translated: Frasa bangun, push-to-talk, input mikrofon, dan umpan balik Talk Mode.

entries.source: Listen for a wake phrase before running voice commands. Recognition runs fully on-device.
entries.translated: Dengarkan frasa bangun sebelum menjalankan perintah suara. Pengenalan berjalan sepenuhnya di perangkat.

entries.source: Start a full voice conversation when a wake phrase is detected.
entries.translated: Mulai percakapan suara penuh saat frasa bangun terdeteksi.

entries.source: Start listening while you hold the key and show the preview overlay.
entries.translated: Mulai mendengarkan saat Anda menahan tombol dan tampilkan overlay pratinjau.

entries.source: Push-to-Talk resumes when Talk Mode is turned off.
entries.translated: Push-to-Talk dilanjutkan saat Talk Mode dimatikan.

entries.source: Play short sounds when Talk Mode switches between listening, thinking, and speaking.
entries.translated: Putar suara singkat saat Talk Mode beralih antara mendengarkan, berpikir, dan berbicara.

entries.source: Tap Right Option to interrupt speech and return to listening.
entries.translated: Ketuk Option Kanan untuk menyela ucapan dan kembali mendengarkan.

entries.source: Short phrases that start voice wake detection.
entries.translated: Frasa pendek yang memulai deteksi bangun suara.
Tidak ada frasa bangun yang dikonfigurasi

entries.source: Languages are tried in order. Models may need a first-use download on macOS 26.
entries.translated: Bahasa dicoba secara berurutan. Model mungkin perlu diunduh saat pertama kali digunakan di macOS 26.

entries.source: OpenClaw reacts when any trigger appears in a transcription. Keep phrases short to avoid false positives.
entries.translated: OpenClaw bereaksi saat pemicu apa pun muncul dalam transkripsi. Buat frasa tetap singkat untuk menghindari positif palsu.

entries.source: Press start, say a trigger word, and wait for detection.
entries.translated: Tekan mulai, ucapkan kata pemicu, lalu tunggu deteksi.
Dalam antrean, dikirim saat tersambung kembali

entries.source: Sent, waiting for chat history confirmation
Delivery unconfirmed, touch and hold to retry or delete
entries.translated: Pengiriman belum dikonfirmasi, sentuh dan tahan untuk mencoba lagi atau menghapus

entries.source: Not sent, touch and hold to retry or delete
entries.translated: Tidak terkirim, sentuh dan tahan untuk mencoba lagi atau menghapus

entries.source: The new certificate is trusted by this device; this is commonly caused by certificate rotation.
entries.translated: Sertifikat baru dipercaya oleh perangkat ini; hal ini biasanya disebabkan oleh rotasi sertifikat.

entries.source: This device could not verify the new certificate.
entries.translated: Perangkat ini tidak dapat memverifikasi sertifikat baru.
